author: crooked.ideas
content_text: Increasingly, people want to use Saudi billions to carve up protected nature reserves in Albania. Here's "Runaway Country" on Ivanka Trump and Jared Kushner's little island project.

author: radio.canada.info
content_text:
Des milliers d’Albanais se mobilisent pour s’opposer à la construction d’un complexe hôtelier par la firme d’investissement du gendre de Donald Trump, Jared Kushner, le mari d’Ivanka Trump, sur une réserve naturelle. Il s’agirait de deux projets se situant sur l’île de Sazan et sur la côte voisine représentant un investissement de 4 à 5 milliards d'euros. De nombreux manifestants dénoncent un manque de transparence de la part du premier ministre d’Albanie, Edi Rama, qui soutient le projet.

#rad

author: bannatidaisocial
content_text:
Le proteste in Albania giungono al nono giorno: migliaia di persone chiedono le dimissioni del primo ministro Rama

Una folla enorme ha invaso il centro di Tirana sventolando bandiere rosse e striscioni con la scritta “Shqipëri e Re” (Nuova Albania), chiedendo le dimissioni di Edi Rama.

Le proteste arrivano mentre Rama deve affrontare le accuse di aver venduto terreni albanesi a investitori stranieri (https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/70754) – tra cui Affinity Partners di Jared Kushner.

author: reuters
content_text:
Flamingos reside in a lagoon where a luxury resort is planned by President Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner.

Thousands have taken to the streets in the capital Tirana and along the southern coast, calling for the project to be scrapped over concerns about its impact on a protected wetland — home to flamingos, seals, and sea turtle nesting sites.

The protests have been dubbed the Flamingo Revolution, as the stretch of coastline serves as a key migratory stop for the birds.

#flamingos #a

author: c4news
content_text:
Thousands of Albanians took to the streets for the tenth consecutive day in mass protests over corruption and economic challenges amidst growing calls for Prime Minister Edi Rama to resign.

Rama has defended a controversial investment project proposed by Donald Trump's son-in-law, Jared Kushner. 

The $1.6bn luxury resort has sparked nationwide outrage because it is near a protected wetland, home to flamingos, seals and sea turtles.

#Albania #JaredKushner #EU #C4News
